conbody.p: CDS Activity Details Report displays the CDS review activity details, how often a CDS reviewed the encounter and TAT.
This reports answers the following business questions:

ol.li: How soon after admission the initial review was performed?
What is the average TAT of initial reviews?
Are there cases that are never getting reviewed? (untouched)
What is the detail around the reviews?
How many total reviews were performed?
Were the reviews were concurrent or retrospective?

conbody.p: Activity Date and Admit Date can be used to filter the data. Default value for Activity Date filter is set to last one week from the current date.

The CDS Activity Details Report displays the following KPI cards:
Initial Reviews
Additional Reviews
Total Reviews
Avg. Initial Review TAT (Hours)
